playlist_title: Berlin Conference: “Man Is Not a Wolf to Man” For a New Paradigm in International Relations!

videos.title: Ray McGovern — Invoke the Noah Principle
videos.description: Ray McGovern, a former CIA analyst, speaking in Berlin at a conference of the Schiller Institute on July 12th, 2025, called the audience to face up to the reality and start building peace. He also pointed out the fact that Trump administration, despite all of its problems, retain a direct line of communication with Russian government is a good news.

videos.title: Prof. Zhang Weiwei —Unite and Prosper NOT Divide and Ruin
videos.description: Prof. Zhang Weiwei, professor of international relations at Fudan-University, China, speaking in Berlin at a conference of the Schiller Institute on July 12th, 2025, highlighted China's remarkable accomplishments in energy self-sufficiency, carbon reduction, and greening the desert. He criticized the geopolitical mindset in Europe that is preventing them from joining hands with China in creating the harmonious development of all nations.

Lyndon LaRouche recruited an international cadre organization, dedicated to defeating that British imperial legacy, and his ideas contributed significantly to the newly emerging paradigm expressed by the Belt and Road Institute (BRI) and the BRICS-Plus dynamic, which now encompasses the majority of the world’s population.

The British and their lackeys are in a full mobilization to prevent such a new order from coming into being. From assassination attempts against both Presidents Trump and Putin, as well as Slovakia’s Prime Minister Robert Fico, and now Colombian presidential candidate Miguel Uribe Turbay, as well as arresting qualified candidates for office, as in France, Romania, and Argentina, to full-blown acts of terrorism and war, the British intend to impose a world order based on oligarchical principles.
